Day 1 and Day 2 are spatially re-split to avoid overlapping coverage. Estimate = route distance × 1.25 road factor ÷ 22 mph. Field/service time is not included.
Combined bbox overlap reduced from 95.8% to 31.5%. Day 1: 1,233 pts / Day 2: 2,734 pts.
